name: EKSO BIONICS HOLDINGS, INC.
summary: PART I Company Background Founded in 2005, we are a Nevada corporation thatdesigns, develops, and markets exoskeleton products that augment human strength, endurance and mobility. The primary end market for ourexoskeleton technology ishealthcare, where our technology primarily serves peoplewith physical disabilities or impairmentsin both physical rehabilitation and mobility.
